lu₂mu-kin₇

(r 7) Witness(es): Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of Nidintu-Anu; Nihistu-Anu, son of Labaši, [...] Ištar-šum-ereš; Nanaya-iddin, son of ...-Anu ... [...].
